title: Beccariella crebrifolia

This plant is part of the genus Beccariella, which is commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The species Beccariella crebrifolia is further divided into various subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. The Sapotaceae family is known for its broad range of species, including edible fruits, medicinal plants, and ornamental trees.
